meaning: n.标志,分数,痕迹,记号vt.做标记于,打分数,标志vi.作记号 Mark 马克(男子名)
examples: Mark Spitz was a great athlete.
She claims Mark fathered her child.
My favourite Venice restaurant is the tiny Alle Testiere, a short walk from St Mark's Square.
It was in death, however, that Nobel made his indelible mark on the world.
